params.text: cool, 20 min triage max, stick to artifacts + timestamps; bob take Chrome/Edge cache+history+downloads, eve take Discord web storage + verify paths w/ a web ref.

action.name: discord.goto_channel

action.name: discord.send_message

params.text: bob drop your Chrome paths + cite when you’re back; i’ll start sketching the triage timeline.

action.reason: to prompt Bob for the requested web-verified artifact paths and keep the triage moving

action.name: discord.send_message

params.text: Chrome artifacts: History/Downloads=...\User Data\Default\History; Cache=...\Default\Cache\Cache_Data (per ForensicsWiki https://forensics.wiki/google_chrome/).

action.reason: to report the web-verified Chrome paths with a 1-line citation back to Alice

action.name: discord.send_message

params.text: Discord web in Chrome: LocalStorage/IndexedDB live under %LOCALAPPDATA%\Google\Chrome\User Data\Default\(Local Storage\leveldb + IndexedDB\) per ForensicsWiki https://forensics.wiki/discord/.

action.reason: to answer Alice’s request with a web-cited storage path summary

action.name: discord.upload_file

params.text: uploaded a quick cache/path cheatsheet for Chrome/Edge + Discord web storage.

action.reason: to share a small evidence-style reference file in-channel for everyone to use

action.name: browser.goto

action.name: browser.goto

action.name: discord.send_message

params.text: nice, ty. bob can you also confirm Edge profile path + cite when back?

action.reason: to request an additional web-verified Edge artifact path and keep triage scoped to evidence

action.name: discord.goto_channel

action.name: discord.goto_channel
action.reason: my UI view is on @me so I need to get back to the case channel before reporting.

action.name: discord.send_message

params.text: good, while bob’s on Edge, eve can you sanity-check Discord token/session storage (cookie vs localstorage) w/ a cite?

action.name: discord.send_message

params.text: Edge (Chromium) profile is %LOCALAPPDATA%\Microsoft\Edge\User Data\Default\ (History/Cache under there) per ForensicsWiki https://forensics.wiki/microsoft_edge/.

action.reason: to answer Alice’s Edge path request with a 1-line citation

action.name: browser.goto
action.reason: to confirm Discord session/token storage details with a solid web reference before replying

action.name: discord.send_message

params.text: sweet. eve once you’ve got token/session storage cite, we’ll lock hypotheses + next steps.

action.reason: to keep Eve focused on the pending web-cited session storage detail before synthesizing the triage plan

action.name: discord.send_message

params.text: while eve’s digging tokens, i’d also grab Chrome/Edge Cookies + Login Data DBs for discord.com session traces.

action.reason: to add a practical browser artifact suggestion while waiting on Eve’s web-cited token/session details

action.name: discord.goto_channel
action.reason: to ensure I'm back in the case Discord channel before posting the token/session storage cite

action.name: discord.send_message

params.text: ok, based on this: we’ll pull History/Downloads, Cookies/Login Data, Cache, plus Discord LocalStorage+IndexedDB; then correlate timestamps to see login + message activity.

action.reason: to synthesize findings so far into a tight triage plan while waiting on Eve’s token/session cite

action.name: discord.send_message

params.text: yep + don’t forget Service Worker/CacheStorage for discord.com (Chrome: Default\Service Worker\ + Default\CacheStorage\) for offline assets.

action.reason: to add a practical browser artifact to Alice’s triage plan in one short message

action.name: discord.send_message

params.text: Discord web auth is cookie-based (look for discord.com cookies in the browser Cookies SQLite); ForensicsWiki notes Discord artifacts include browser cookies + Local Storage/IndexedDB: https://forensics.wiki/discord/.

action.reason: to answer Alice’s token/session storage question with a concise, cited note in-channel

action.name: discord.send_message

params.text: cool, locking it in: prioritize Cookies+History+Downloads, then Discord LocalStorage/IndexedDB + CacheStorage/SW; hypothesis is web login + suspicious link click, next is build a tight timeline and pull any discord.com cached API payloads.

action.reason: to synthesize everyone’s findings into a concise prioritized triage plan and next steps.

action.name: discord.send_message

params.text: sgtm, if we need quick link triage: check History for discord.com/*/channels + any shorteners right before first login.

action.reason: to add one last practical browser-timeline pivot before the team wraps triage.

action.name: discord.send_message

params.text: yep, and if it’s Discord *desktop* too, grab %APPDATA%\discord\Local Storage\leveldb + Cookies; ForensicsWiki covers the desktop paths: https://forensics.wiki/discord/.

action.reason: to add a quick edge-case check (desktop client artifacts) with a citation before the wrap

action.name: discord.send_message

params.text: last check: if desktop Discord exists, grab %APPDATA%\discord\Cache + Code Cache too, then we’re done 👍

action.reason: to wrap with one final practical artifact reminder and close the time-boxed triage.

action.name: discord.send_message

params.text: 👍 i’m good; if we see exfil, also check WebData + autofill for pasted creds.

action.reason: to acknowledge wrap and add one last relevant browser artifact hint

action.name: discord.send_message

params.text: all set on my end; only caveat is tokens can also live in desktop LevelDB, so don’t over-trust browser cookies alone.

action.reason: to close out with a skeptical caveat about alternative token storage paths.
